market_signals: 500+ coordinator job postings mention spreadsheet-heavy workflows
Reddit threads complain about shipment update chaos
arena.market_size_signal: 500+ active ops roles plus paid incumbent tools
arena.rationale: The space shows visible pain, identifiable buyers, and software-first workarounds.

dimension_rationale.pain_signal_visibility: Pain is visible in both jobs data and complaint threads.
dimension_rationale.market_size_signal: The arena is large enough to support software spend.

problem_unit.job_to_be_done: Coordinate shipment exception updates across carrier, warehouse, and customer teams
problem_unit.trigger_event: A shipment misses its planned handoff or ETA
problem_unit.urgency: Customers escalate quickly when updates are late
problem_unit.cost_of_failure: Lost time, angry customers, and avoidable credits
problem_unit.proof_of_spend: Headcount and paid logistics tooling both show established spend

top_evidence.verbatim_quote: We still push shipment exceptions around in spreadsheets every day.
Own inbound exception management across carrier, warehouse, and customer teams.
top_evidence.inferred_pain: Companies hire people to coordinate exceptions manually.

top_evidence.verbatim_quote: Customers escalate when update windows slip and nobody knows the source of delay.
top_evidence.inferred_pain: Exception visibility gaps create customer escalations.

top_evidence.verbatim_quote: Experience with paid TMS and workflow automation tooling required.
top_evidence.inferred_pain: Teams already budget for logistics workflow tooling.

top_evidence.verbatim_quote: Mid-market TMS buyers typically pay for exception dashboards and carrier integrations.
top_evidence.inferred_pain: Exception management already has budget and pricing anchors.

scoring.confidence_rationale: Spend signals now support a viable wedge test.

dimension_evidence.proof_of_spend: Both job postings and pricing pages show established tooling budget.

dimension_rationale.proof_of_spend: The targeted pass closed the main evidence gap.

risk_flags: Switching friction will need onboarding support.
skeptic.landscape_detail: The market is active, but the problem is still underserved in the exception workflow layer.
skeptic.recommendation_rationale: The candidate is now strong enough to design a wedge.

selected_wedge.wedge_promise: We automate shipment exception triage so ops teams deliver faster customer updates without replacing their TMS.
selected_wedge.key_capability: Pulls exception events from existing systems, assigns next actions, and drafts customer-facing updates.
selected_wedge.target_outcome: Reduce update lag and customer escalations within 30 days.
selected_wedge.differentiation: Adds a focused workflow layer on top of incumbent systems instead of competing as a full platform.
selected_wedge.mvp_scope: Exception intake, triage, and outbound update workflow for one warehouse operation.
selected_wedge.first_10_onboarding: Connect one existing TMS feed and map one escalation workflow.
selected_wedge.switching_ease: Sidecar rollout with one team before expansion.
selected_wedge.data_advantage: Captures structured exception-response timing and outcomes.

channel_validation.procurement_notes: The sidecar rollout and low initial integration burden keep procurement light.

channels.how_to_reach: Cold email Heads of Ops via filtered logistics lists
channels.message_angle: Reduce shipment update lag without a rip-and-replace project
channels.first_20_plan: Start with 20 Heads of Ops across 3PLs and warehouse-heavy distributors.

channels.how_to_reach: Founder-led LinkedIn outreach to VP Operations and logistics leaders
channels.lead_source: LinkedIn Sales Navigator title and company filters
channels.message_angle: Show how the sidecar workflow cuts customer escalations
channels.first_20_plan: Follow email with ten warm-looking LinkedIn prospects and use the escalation metric angle.

channel_validation.verdict_rationale: Two channels and a clear buyer map make the wedge reachable.

gate_history.reason: Borderline candidate should run a targeted evidence pass.
Score clears the normal advance threshold.
The wedge should be revised using critique feedback.
